prospectorAiLaunch.title: Prospector AI – Prospecting with artificial intelligence
prospectorAiLaunch.subtitle: Platform to find leads by location, analyze with AI, and multiply your sales. Watch the video.
prospectorAiLaunch.videoCaption: Watch the Prospector AI platform demo.

prospectorAi.heroTitle: Prospector AI – Artificial intelligence for prospecting
prospectorAi.heroSubtitle: B2B prospecting platform with artificial intelligence. Find leads by location, analyze with AI, and multiply your sales.
prospectorAi.whatIsBody: Prospector AI is a prospecting platform with artificial intelligence that combines location-based search and AI-driven analysis. Search for businesses by region, analyze competition and market viability, classify leads with tags (Hot, Warm, Cold), manage your team and track metrics. Ideal for sales teams, agencies and entrepreneurs who want to qualify and convert more leads with AI.
prospectorAi.featuresSubtitle: Artificial intelligence applied to prospecting: find, analyze and convert more leads.
prospectorAi.feature1Desc: Enter niche and region. AI finds real businesses via Google Places and builds your lead list.
prospectorAi.feature2Desc: Viability score, competition analysis, and digital maturity — all automated with real data.
prospectorAi.feature3Desc: Export leads, tag them (Hot, Warm, Cold), and track WhatsApp and email clicks.
prospectorAi.howSubtitle: Three steps to transform your prospecting.
prospectorAi.how1Desc: Enter niche and region. Our AI finds real businesses via Google Places.
prospectorAi.how2Desc: AI score, competition, viability — all automated with real data.
prospectorAi.how3Desc: Personalized scripts, WhatsApp, and full pipeline to close more deals.
prospectorAi.newFeature1Desc: Rankings by rating, digital presence, and market opportunities.
prospectorAi.newFeature2Desc: AI analyzes whether it's worth opening a business in the region — Score 0-10.
prospectorAi.newFeature3Desc: Classify leads as Hot, Warm, or Cold. Create custom tags.
prospectorAi.newFeature4Desc: Invite sales reps, set goals, and track performance rankings.
prospectorAi.newFeature5Desc: Segmentation, digital maturity, and saturation index by region.
prospectorAi.newFeature6Desc: Track clicks on Call, WhatsApp, and Email for each lead.
prospectorAi.finalCtaSubtitle: Create your free account and start prospecting with AI in minutes.

saas.title: Innexar SaaS - Business Management (ERP)
saas.subtitle: A fully rebrandable, multi-tenant ERP SaaS platform for SMBs
saas.overviewDescription: A web-based, multi-tenant ERP platform designed for small and medium businesses. The solution offers secure, branded instances via subdomains with automated provisioning and flexible module activation according to plans.
saas.objective: Provide an integrated management suite that supports commercial, administrative and operational workflows, online plan subscriptions, automated tenant provisioning, and modular billing.
saas.tech: Backend in Python, PostgreSQL, frontend in modern JavaScript, containerized deployments (Docker/Kubernetes), wildcard DNS for subdomains and integrations with payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal).
saas.featuresSubtitle: Built with scalability and security in mind, our platform provides everything you need to run a successful SaaS business.

feature1.title: Multi-Tenant Architecture
feature1.description: Secure, isolated environments for each client with shared infrastructure for optimal cost efficiency.

hero.title: Choose your
hero.subtitle: We offer two powerful SaaS solutions: the multi-tenant Innexar ERP and StructurOne, focused on construction and real estate.

successStories.title: Impact across industries
successStories.subtitle: We build platforms that unlock efficiency, revenue and delightful experiences for teams and customers.

cases.name: StructurOne
cases.challenge: Manual spreadsheets, disconnected teams and no visibility across multi-million construction projects.
cases.solution: Multi-tenant ERP with budgeting, procurement, document management and analytics, integrated with Stripe for billing and Procore for operations.
results: 85% faster budget approvals and field updates
Automated billing with multi-currency subscriptions
Executive dashboards with real-time project health

cases.name: Bluemart Marketplace
cases.challenge: Fragmented customer journeys and slow merchandising updates across 12 product categories.
cases.solution: Headless commerce architecture with CMS, promotions engine, AI recommendations and unified customer accounts.
results: 3x increase in add-to-cart conversions
Unified inventory sync across ERP, logistics and POS
Personalised experiences in three languages

cases.name: Helios Energy Field Ops
cases.challenge: Paper-based inspections and compliance data scattered across legacy systems.
cases.solution: Offline-first mobile apps for field engineers, automated reporting pipelines and compliance dashboards.
results: 40% reduction in inspection time
Audit-ready reports generated automatically
Predictive maintenance alerts powered by IoT streams

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What's included in the base package?
faq.a1: 5-page responsive website, mobile optimization, contact forms, SEO basics, and 30 days of post-launch support.
faq.a2: Most sites are delivered within 5 business days after you complete the onboarding form.
faq.a3: You purchase and own your domain. We help you connect it to your new website at no extra charge.
faq.a4: 30 days of post-launch support is included. Extended support packages are available as an add-on.

cookies.title: 🍪 We Use Cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyze traffic, and personalize content. You can manage your preferences below.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Google Analytics to understand how you use the site
cookies.marketingDesc: Meta Pixel and Google Ads for personalized advertising

terms.title: Terms of Service

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Innexar's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.

services.title: Services Provided
services.content: Innexar provides web development, SaaS, and digital consulting services. Each project is subject to its specific contract and onboarding requirements.

hosting.title: Hosting and Support
hosting.content: Hosting services are provided as specified in the service plan. Fees for hosting and maintenance are recurring after the initial trial period, as detailed in the project contract.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The website content and software developed for the client are subject to the ownership terms defined in the specific service agreement signed during onboarding.

limitations.title: Limitations of Liability
limitations.content: Innexar shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use our services.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Florida, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

terms.footerNote: For any questions regarding these terms, please contact us at sales@innexar.com.br

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us (name, email, business details) and automated usage data via cookies to improve our services.

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Data
dataUsage.content: Your data is used to provide services, process payments, communicate project updates, and improve website performance.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.content: We do not sell your personal data. We only share information with trusted third-party service providers (like Stripe or Dynadot) necessary to fulfill our services.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies to personalize content, analyze traffic, and for marketing purposes. You can manage your preferences through our Cookie Consent banner.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us to exercise these rights.

privacy.footerNote: This privacy policy is subject to change. Please review it periodically.

hero.title: Professional website creation for your business in up to 48 hours.
hero.subtitle: We build your professional website quickly, optimized for Google and ready to generate leads. Modern design with support included.
hero.priceStrip: Professional website creation - Starting at R$ 197/month

steps.title: Choose your plan

steps.title: Receive your ready site
steps.desc: Your website is delivered within 48 or 72 hours.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.quote: Our website was ready in two days and we are already receiving contacts.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: We can use your domain or register a new one.
faq.a2: Plans have a minimum term of 12 months.
faq.q4: Will my site appear on Google?

ctaFinal.title: Stop losing clients to competitors.
ctaFinal.subtitle: Professional website creation: fast, SEO-ready and with support.
